response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at Naver), but the profile does not match a Director-level Principal Engineer AI Strategy role. Tenure totals roughly 13-15 years depending on how early freelance work is counted, with no evidence of recognized AI expertise, AI/ML products shipped at scale, cloud platform strategy work, or advising strategic customers. The resume reads as an IC software craftsman, not a principal-level AI strategist.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Naver
Strong community presence through workshops, talks, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published AI products, or recognized thought leadership in AI
No Director-level scope, principal IC influence, or strategic customer-advisory experience
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth; cloud work is application-level (AWS CDK) rather than platform architecture

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI products
Seniority gap vs Director-level Principal IC scope
Recent MCP and AI-agent tooling exposure
